"---K183 details---
Overview
The Deluxe Set is a major step up from the DIY Starter Kit. It contains all the homeowner tools that the DIY Starter Kit offers but with the addition of two full size Screwdrivers, Diagonal Pliers, Magnetic Stud Finder, a longer Tape Measure, a larger Hammer and upgraded Heavy Duty Scissors. The major enhancement is the addition of a 90T 3/8in Ratchet and a good selection of 3/8in Metric and SAE Sockets. The addition of the Ratchet and Sockets allows the end user a wider range of jobs such as outdoor power equipment repair and general automotive work.

Set Includes: 13oz Fiberglass Hammer, 6in Long Nose Pliers, 6in Slip Joint Pliers, 6in Diagonal Pliers, Adjustable Wrench, 16ft Tape Measure, Utility Knife and 3 Blades, 16pc Hex Key Set (SAE and Metric), 9in Mag Torpedo Level, 8in Heavy-duty Scissors

Set Also Includes: Magnetic Screwdriver Handle with 30pc Bits, 6pc Screwdrivers, 3/8in Drive 90-tooth Ratchet, 14pc 3/8-in Drive 6-point Sockets, 3/8in Drive 3in Extension Bar, 2in x 3/8in Drive Drill Adapter, Magnetic Stud Finder, 100pc Hardware Kit
